title: Real Ghost Blocks!
description: This Plugin allows you to place some Ghost Block (like secretrooms) !
body:
***Keep in mind that is my first plugin and my first project in Java, so please accept all bugs and problems...***

**Command:**

/giveghostblocks (/ggh)

/clearallghostblocks (/cagb)

**Instructions:**

Right Click with Ghost Blocks to place it.

Shift + Right Click to break it.


**How is it works?:**

This plugin uses FallingBlocks entities to create the illusion...
